full_text:
Lu Kui 魯馗
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Lu Kui (魯馗)was born in Pingling county, Fufeng commandery. Served Han as Court Steward. Killed by Li Jue and Guo Si’s troops. Lu Kui was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Lu Kui lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
